title: minuartia recurva
intro: Minuartia recurva, also known as rock cinquefoil, is a small flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Minuartia recurva include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal properties, and is often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
